title: Bloatcraft
description: A modpack for anyone with an appetite for large quantities of mods!
body:
# Welcome to Bloatcraft!


Have you ever felt like the modpack you were playing didn’t have enough mods in it?

Has the amount of RAM dedicated to Minecraft not exceeded 5GB?

**Fear not: Bloatcraft is here!**

With more than 450 mods and a minimum 10GB of dedicated RAM, Bloatcraft is everything you could ask for!

Have you ever wanted to…

_…build a factory with walls and walls of machines?_

_…be the master of magic and perform arcane spells and rituals?_

_…grow more crops than ever before, and then make them into delicious looking meals?_

_…decorate every single block of space in your ridiculously lavish mansion?_

_…make villagers do all the work for you?_

_…take over the world with your magic and machines?_

_…go on adventures for loot and glory across biomes new and old?_

Well, in Bloatcraft you can! And every way you want to play, there is at least one mod for you, but most likely multiple ones!

**_Also, we really weren’t kidding about the 10GB of RAM needed! For the best experience, allocate 15GB of RAM to Minecraft using the Modrinth Launcher._**


[KubeJS Industrial Foregoing](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/kubejs-industrial-foregoing/files/5636455)

[KubeJS Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/kubejs-delight/files/5586257)
